{{Infobox icon
| name = Bow Icon
| introduced = Reaper
}}

''See also: [[Bow Icon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Bow]] [[Icon]] is a powerful spiritual concept and archetype that represents the [[essence]] of archery. Rather than being merely a tool, it serves as a universal template known as [[The Archer]], allowing a wielder to tap into the collective power and meaning of all who have used bows throughout history. This connection provides users with a sense of mysterious authority and can grant specific abilities, such as enhanced eyesight. The [[Icon]] is described as having its own desires, specifically a drive to be utilized in combat. In practice, the [[Bow]] [[Icon]] can manifest as a visual symbol in the sky and provides significant combat advantages. It allows archers to forge specialized arrows from [[madra]] or bindings, sometimes enabling them to bypass logic, defenses, and the stability of reality to strike a target's core. The [[Icon]] can also facilitate massive volleys, such as an arrow that splits into multiple possibilities to create a rain of projectiles. While it provides immense strength, the authority granted by the [[Icon]] is often borrowed from sources like the Book of Eternal Night or specific predecessors.}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|There is a concept known as the [[Bow Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Bow Icon]] gives [[Larian]] keen eyesight.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow]] [[Icon]] serves as a source of support for its user, specifically backing the arrows used by [[Malice]]. During combat, [[Mercy]] perceives the [[Icon]] drawing closer, and the attacks launched by [[Malice]] eventually carry echoes of its presence. The image of the [[Netherworld Empress]] resonates with several [[Icons]], including this one, which in turn provides her with sight. Following its appearance in the sky, it is noted that the [[Bow]] [[Icon]] is not the closest [[Icon]] to [[Mercy]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow Icon]] can provide support to a user.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]]'s arrows were backed by the [[Bow Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow Icon]] grows closer during combat in [[Mercy]]'s vision.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Attacks from [[Malice]] carry echoes of the [[Bow Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Netherworld Empress]]'s image resonates with several [[Icons]], including the [[Bow Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow Icon]] provides sight to the [[Netherworld Empress]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow Icon]] appeared in the sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Bow Icon]] is not the closest [[Icon]] to [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] can listen to an echo of the [[Bow Icon]] to release a volley of arrows.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|it resonates with a bunch of Icons. You can sense that kind of thing more clearly than I can, though. Lindon began muttering. “Bow Icon, Shadow Icon, Strength Icon…is that the Crown Icon? It must be.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
